description: (1) spawn's implicit gather rule (scalar handle args => all-required; a list of handles => reduce-over-survivors) is invisible at the call site and documented only in a docstring — promote to README, or make explicit e.g. do(fn, survivors(handles)). (2) memo dep sentinel '<absent>' can collide with a genuine string result (engine._memo_key) — use a non-string sentinel in the key material. (3) Handle.result is shape-polymorphic (scalar vs list by kind).
title: spawn() gather heuristic + memo dep sentinel: make explicit
